case_title: LESLIE FIELDS et al VS. R. ERNEST MONTANARI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-23-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-09-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
